creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
devd should be running the newly visible devices through devmatch after things load. The fact that's not happening is the bug, not the order of the devmatch script in rc.

This suggests the real bug is in virtio_pci doesn't generage NOMATCH events that devd will use to drive devmatch to load drivers for them. We need to see why that isn't happening.
